category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers entering the United Arab Emirates market.

title.en: China-to-UAE LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入阿联酋：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入阿聯酋：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against UAE conformity requirements administered by the Ministry of Industry and Advanced Technology (MoIAT, incorporating the former ESMA): the Emirates Conformity Assessment Scheme (ECAS) and Emirates Quality Mark (EQM), UAE.S national standards (adopting GSO Gulf standards plus IEC/EN), GSO regional alignment, the UAE energy-efficiency label for lighting, and an in-country importer/registrant requirement, versus Chinese GB standards and CCC certification.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与阿联酋合规要求差距对照，阿联酋合规由工业和先进技术部（MoIAT，已并入原 ESMA）管理：阿联酋合格评定计划（ECAS）与阿联酋质量标志（EQM）、UAE.S 国家标准（采用 GSO 海湾标准及 IEC/EN）、GSO 区域协调、阿联酋照明能效标签及在地进口商/注册人要求，与中国 GB 标准及 CCC 认证对比。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與阿聯酋合規要求差距對照，阿聯酋合規由工業和先進技術部（MoIAT，已併入原 ESMA）管理：阿聯酋合格評定計劃（ECAS）與阿聯酋質量標誌（EQM）、UAE.S 國家標準（採用 GSO 海灣標準及 IEC/EN）、GSO 區域協調、阿聯酋照明能效標籤及在地進口商/註冊人要求，與中國 GB 標準及 CCC 認證對比。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body determination, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current UAE law, MoIAT/ESMA technical regulations, ECAS and EQM scheme requirements, UAE.S / GSO standards, the UAE energy-efficiency labelling requirements for lighting, and any applicable GSO substance rules with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构认定、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行阿联酋法律、MoIAT/ESMA 技术法规、ECAS 与 EQM 计划要求、UAE.S / GSO 标准、阿联酋照明能效标签要求及任何适用的 GSO 物质规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構認定、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行阿聯酋法律、MoIAT/ESMA 技術法規、ECAS 與 EQM 計劃要求、UAE.S / GSO 標準、阿聯酋照明能效標籤要求及任何適用的 GSO 物質規則。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer entering the UAE market must register the product under the Emirates Conformity Assessment Scheme (ECAS) administered by MoIAT (incorporating the former ESMA) and obtain a Certificate of Conformity before customs clearance at ports such as Jebel Ali (Dubai) or Khalifa (Abu Dhabi); meet electrical safety to UAE.S IEC 60598 / IEC 62560 and photobiological safety to UAE.S IEC 62471; meet EMC requirements aligned with CISPR 15 (emissions) and IEC 61547 (immunity); meet the UAE energy-efficiency requirements and carry the UAE energy-efficiency label for lighting (and register where the scheme requires); appoint an in-country importer/registrant who holds the certificate and bears legal responsibility; and where a higher-tier mark is sought, apply for the Emirates Quality Mark (EQM). The product is rated for a 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid (50 Hz matches China, but the voltage differs from China's 220/380 V). None of these UAE steps are covered by existing Chinese CCC certification.
answer_first.zh: 进入阿联酋市场的中国 LED 灯具制造商须：依据由 MoIAT（已并入原 ESMA）管理的阿联酋合格评定计划（ECAS）注册产品，并在 Jebel Ali（迪拜）或 Khalifa（阿布扎比）等口岸清关前取得符合性证书；电气安全须符合 UAE.S IEC 60598 / IEC 62560，光生物安全须符合 UAE.S IEC 62471；电磁兼容须符合与 CISPR 15（发射）及 IEC 61547（抗扰度）一致的要求；满足阿联酋能效要求并贴附阿联酋照明能效标签（在计划要求时进行注册）；指定持有证书并承担法律责任的在地进口商/注册人；如需更高层级标志，则申请阿联酋质量标志（EQM）。产品按 230/400 V、50 Hz 电网额定（50 Hz 与中国相同，但电压不同于中国的 220/380 V）。上述阿联酋步骤均不被现有中国 CCC 认证所涵盖。
answer_first.zht: 進入阿聯酋市場的中國 LED 燈具製造商須：依據由 MoIAT（已併入原 ESMA）管理的阿聯酋合格評定計劃（ECAS）註冊產品，並在 Jebel Ali（迪拜）或 Khalifa（阿布扎比）等口岸清關前取得符合性證書；電氣安全須符合 UAE.S IEC 60598 / IEC 62560，光生物安全須符合 UAE.S IEC 62471；電磁兼容須符合與 CISPR 15（發射）及 IEC 61547（抗擾度）一致的要求；滿足阿聯酋能效要求並貼附阿聯酋照明能效標籤（在計劃要求時進行註冊）；指定持有證書並承擔法律責任的在地進口商/註冊人；如需更高層級標誌，則申請阿聯酋質量標誌（EQM）。產品按 230/400 V、50 Hz 電網額定（50 Hz 與中國相同，但電壓不同於中國的 220/380 V）。上述阿聯酋步驟均不被現有中國 CCC 認證所涵蓋。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official UAE regulator (MoIAT/ESMA), GSO, UAE.S / GSO standards body, IEC/EN standard reference, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs and non-official secondary sources are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. UAE energy-efficiency thresholds for lighting, ECAS scope, and any GSO substance rules must be re-verified against current MoIAT/ESMA and GSO requirements on each review cycle.

q.en: Which UAE scheme applies to LED luminaires and lamps?
q.zh: 哪项阿联酋计划适用于LED灯具和灯泡？
q.zht: 哪項阿聯酋計劃適用於LED燈具和燈泡？

a.en: The Emirates Conformity Assessment Scheme (ECAS), administered by the Ministry of Industry and Advanced Technology (MoIAT, incorporating the former ESMA), applies to LED luminaires and lamps. Products must obtain an ECAS Certificate of Conformity against the applicable UAE.S standards (which adopt GSO Gulf standards plus IEC/EN), meet the UAE energy-efficiency requirements for lighting and carry the UAE energy-efficiency label where required, and have an in-country importer/registrant before market placement. A higher-tier Emirates Quality Mark (EQM) is available on a voluntary basis.
a.zh: 由工业和先进技术部（MoIAT，已并入原 ESMA）管理的阿联酋合格评定计划（ECAS）适用于 LED 灯具和灯泡。产品须依据适用的 UAE.S 标准（采用 GSO 海湾标准及 IEC/EN）取得 ECAS 符合性证书，满足阿联酋照明能效要求并在有要求时贴附阿联酋能效标签，且在上市前须有在地进口商/注册人。更高层级的阿联酋质量标志（EQM）可在自愿基础上申请。
a.zht: 由工業和先進技術部（MoIAT，已併入原 ESMA）管理的阿聯酋合格評定計劃（ECAS）適用於 LED 燈具和燈泡。產品須依據適用的 UAE.S 標準（採用 GSO 海灣標準及 IEC/EN）取得 ECAS 符合性證書，滿足阿聯酋照明能效要求並在有要求時貼附阿聯酋能效標籤，且在上市前須有在地進口商/註冊人。更高層級的阿聯酋質量標誌（EQM）可在自願基礎上申請。

q.en: Does Chinese CCC certification cover all compliance requirements for LED luminaires in the UAE?
q.zh: 中国CCC认证是否涵盖LED灯具在阿联酋的所有合规要求？
q.zht: 中國CCC認證是否涵蓋LED燈具在阿聯酋的所有合規要求？

a.en: No. Chinese CCC certification is not recognised for UAE market access. LED luminaires require an ECAS Certificate of Conformity against UAE.S standards (electrical safety to IEC 60598 / IEC 62560, photobiological safety to IEC 62471, EMC aligned with CISPR 15 and IEC 61547), compliance with the UAE energy-efficiency requirements and label for lighting, and an in-country importer/registrant. These are separate obligations from Chinese CCC, and certificates must be issued or recognised by MoIAT/ESMA-notified conformity assessment bodies.
a.zh: 不。中国 CCC 认证不被阿联酋市场准入所认可。LED 灯具须取得依据 UAE.S 标准的 ECAS 符合性证书（电气安全符合 IEC 60598 / IEC 62560，光生物安全符合 IEC 62471，电磁兼容与 CISPR 15 及 IEC 61547 一致），符合阿联酋照明能效要求及标签，并须有在地进口商/注册人。这些均为独立于中国 CCC 的义务，证书须由 MoIAT/ESMA 指定的合格评定机构出具或认可。
a.zht: 不。中國 CCC 認證不被阿聯酋市場准入所認可。LED 燈具須取得依據 UAE.S 標準的 ECAS 符合性證書（電氣安全符合 IEC 60598 / IEC 62560，光生物安全符合 IEC 62471，電磁兼容與 CISPR 15 及 IEC 61547 一致），符合阿聯酋照明能效要求及標籤，並須有在地進口商/註冊人。這些均為獨立於中國 CCC 的義務，證書須由 MoIAT/ESMA 指定的合格評定機構出具或認可。
